email_subject: Application for Marketing Officer at Konvert Interim
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Marketing Officer position at Konvert Interim, as advertised on VDAB. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and content management, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your dynamic team in Dessel.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I develop and implement SEO strategies, manage WordPress sites, and analyze performance data to optimize campaigns. I have hands-on experience with budget tracking, content creation, and social media integration. My project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to coordinate events and content projects, from planning to execution.

I am a hands-on, organized professional who thrives on variety and responsibility. I am eager to bring my strategic thinking and creative energy to Konvert Interim, supporting your employer branding and marketing initiatives.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Marketing Officer position at Konvert Interim. As a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in SEO, content management, and web development, I am drawn to this role's blend of strategy and execution. Your description of a 'gamechanger' who moves seamlessly between big-picture planning and hands-on implementation resonates with my approach.

In my current role at Episto, I own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, and I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. I track performance with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush, using data to continuously optimize campaigns. These experiences have honed my ability to manage budgets, plan content, and coordinate with external partners—skills directly relevant to your needs.

My independent project, mirook.com, further demonstrates my capability. I designed and built the site, implemented structured data for AI search visibility, and coordinated social media integration. This project required end-to-end management, from strategy to execution, similar to the event and content coordination you seek.

I am a proactive, organized individual who takes initiative and enjoys working in a collaborative team. I am eager to contribute to Konvert Interim's growth story, bringing fresh ideas to employer branding and marketing campaigns. I am also committed to continuous learning, currently improving my Dutch (A2 level).

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can support your team. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Developed and implemented marketing strategies and campaigns, including SEO and content, at Episto
- Managed budgets, planning, and external contacts for client projects
- Coordinated content projects and social media integration for mirook.com
- Analyzed campaign results using Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush to optimize performance
- Built and maintained websites in WordPress, ensuring consistent brand presence
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and content management. At Episto, I develop and implement marketing strategies, manage budgets, and coordinate campaigns from planning to execution. On my own project (mirook.com), I have coordinated content projects, social media integration, and event-related content. I combine strategic thinking with a hands-on, organized approach, and I am eager to bring my creativity and initiative to a dynamic team. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Marketing strategy & campaign implementation
- Budget management & planning
- Employer branding & content creation
- Event & content project coordination
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Develop and implement SEO strategies and campaigns for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Manage budgets and planning for client projects, ensuring efficient allocation of resources
- Coordinate with external partners and freelancers as needed for content and technical tasks
- Write keyword-targeted blog content and manage editorial calendars to support marketing goals
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and Astra, including content uploads and page updates
- Track and analyze campaign performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide optimization

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & Content Project (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Coordinated content creation and event-related content (e.g., tournament announcements, blog posts)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility
- Managed project timeline and deliverables independently

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
